home about Embedded Linux Roadmap Embedded Linux Reference Research blog contact
cheat sheet

Embedded Linux Reference

Essential commands, concepts, and workflows — everything you reach for daily as an embedded Linux engineer.

Boot Sequence
ROM / BootROM Runs from mask ROM, initialises minimal hardware
SPL / MLO Secondary Program Loader — fits in SRAM, loads U-Boot
U-Boot Full bootloader — sets up DDR, loads kernel + DTB
Linux Kernel Decompresses, probes hardware via DT, mounts rootfs
Init (systemd) PID 1 — starts user-space services
Toolchain
arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc -o app app.c
arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc -march=armv7-a -mfpu=neon -O2 -o app app.c
file binarycheck arch
readelf -a binaryELF headers
objdump -d binary | lessdisassemble
nm -C binarysymbols
arm-linux-gnueabihf-strip binaryreduce size
ldd binaryshared libs
Kernel Build
make ARCH=arm CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- menuconfig
make ARCH=arm CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- zImage dtbs modules -j$(nproc)
make ARCH=arm CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- modules_install INSTALL_MOD_PATH=/rootfs
make ARCH=arm CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- dtbs
make ARCH=arm mrproperclean all
scripts/config --enable CONFIG_DEBUG_INFO
make ARCH=arm savedefconfig
U-Boot
make CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- <board>_defconfig
make CROSS_COMPILE=arm-linux-gnueabihf- -j$(nproc)
setenv bootargs "console=ttyS0,115200 root=/dev/mmcblk0p2 rw"
setenv bootcmd "tftp 0x80000000 zImage; bootz 0x80000000"
tftp 0x80000000 zImageload over network
bootz 0x80000000 - 0x88000000kernel - dtb
saveenv
printenv
Kernel Modules
insmod module.ko
rmmod module
modprobe moduleauto deps
modinfo module.ko
lsmod
dmesg | tail -30
cat /proc/devices
ls /sys/class/<subsystem>
echo 7 > /proc/sys/kernel/printkverbose log
Device Tree
dtc -I dts -O dtb -o out.dtb board.dtscompile
dtc -I dtb -O dts -o out.dts board.dtbdecompile
fdtdump board.dtb
cat /proc/device-tree/compatible
ls /sys/firmware/devicetree/base/
dtc -I fs /sys/firmware/devicetree/baselive DT
Yocto / Buildroot
source oe-init-build-env [build-dir]
bitbake core-image-minimal
bitbake -c devshell <recipe>
bitbake -c cleansstate <recipe>
bitbake-layers show-layers
bitbake-layers add-layer ../meta-custom
make menuconfigBuildroot
make <board>_defconfigBuildroot
make sdkgenerate SDK
Debugging
gdbserver :1234 ./appon target
arm-linux-gnueabihf-gdb appon host
(gdb) target remote <ip>:1234
strace -e trace=file ./app
ltrace -l libc.so.6 ./app
perf stat -e cache-misses,cache-references ./app
perf record -g ./app && perf report
valgrind --leak-check=full --track-origins=yes ./app
echo 1 > /proc/sys/kernel/sysrq
Filesystem
mkfs.ext4 /dev/mmcblk0p2
mount -t ext4 /dev/mmcblk0p2 /mnt
mount -t nfs -o nolock <host>:/rootfs /mnt
mknod /dev/mem c 1 1create node
df -hdisk usage
du -sh *
find /lib -name "*.so" | xargs arm-linux-gnueabihf-strip
systemd
systemctl status <service>
systemctl enable --now <service>
journalctl -u <service> -f
systemd-analyze blameboot time
systemd-cglscgroup tree
loginctl list-sessions
Serial / UART
minicom -D /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200
screen /dev/ttyUSB0 115200
stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 115200 cs8 -cstopb -parenb
cat /dev/ttyUSB0
dmesg | grep ttyfind port
QEMU
qemu-system-arm -M vexpress-a9 -m 512M -kernel zImage -dtb vexpress-v2p-ca9.dtb -nographic -append "console=ttyAMA0"
qemu-system-arm -M versatilepb -kernel zImage -initrd rootfs.cpio.gz -nographic
qemu-arm ./appuser-mode emulation
<Eslam El Hefny />

Research & Teaching Assistant · Embedded Linux Engineer
